name: Chocolate Sour Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt chocolate and butter together; let cool slightly.
3. Beat egg yolks and sugar until lemon-colored.
4. Add melted chocolate mixture and egg whites.
5. Pour batter into a buttered 10-1/2-inch spring form pan.
6. Sprinkle drained cherries evenly on top.
7. Bake for 55 minutes.
8. Let cool for 15 minutes, then run knife around the edge to loosen.
9. Allow cake to cool completely before removing from pan.
